Site: Tamilarasu Arunachalam
URL: https://tamilarasu-arunachalam.github.io
Description: A technical blog focused on readable tutorials and practical solutions for Dynamics 365, Power Platform, Azure, JavaScript, and CRM automation.

Primary Audience:
- Developers and technical architects
- Power Platform professionals
- Microsoft Dynamics 365 implementers
- Automation and integration specialists

Primary Topics:
- Dynamics 365 and Power Apps development
- Power Automate flows and connectors
- Azure integrations and cloud automation
- JavaScript solutions for business applications
- CRM customization, plugins, and API usage

SEO / AEO Metadata:
- Language: English
- Geo: Chennai, India
- Content Type: Technical articles, tutorials, product reviews, how-to guides
- Structured Data: Jekyll SEO Tag plugin enabled
